definition: The core 3-step ICT trade pattern that unifies layers 3-5 into a single executable flow. This is the ATOMIC UNIT of an ICT trade.
depends_on: liquidity_sweep (step 1: the raid that triggers the pattern)
fair_value_gaps (step 3: entry zone created by displacement)
order_blocks (step 3: entry zone — last opposing candle)
feeds_into: market_maker_model (SRDR is the core 3-step atom inside the full model)
entry_models (SRDR completion = minimum viable ICT entry)

step_1_stop_raid.what: Price sweeps a liquidity level (stops are hit). This IS the manipulation.
step_1_stop_raid.output: Sweep extreme (SL reference) + trapped traders (fuel for step 2)

step_2_displacement.what: Strong move in the OPPOSITE direction of the raid. Proves the raid was manipulation.
step_2_displacement.connection: If step 2 doesn't occur after step 1, step 1 was NOT manipulation — it was a real breakout. ABORT.

step_3_retracement_entry.what: Price pulls back into the FVG/OB created by displacement. THIS is where you enter.
step_3_retracement_entry.connection: The retracement INTO the FVG/OB is the entry. The OTE zone (0.618-0.786 of the displacement) refines the exact price.

key_insight: Most traders fail because they enter at step 1 (chasing the raid) or step 2 (chasing the displacement). The ONLY correct entry is step 3 — the retracement. This pattern chains liquidity_sweep → displacement → FVG/OB → OTE into one atomic action.
